name: Lamu Old Town Coastal Flood Protection
blocking_factor: Heritage preservation constraints conflict with structural flood defences
notes: UNESCO heritage designation complicates hard engineering solutions. Seawall design rejected twice on aesthetic grounds. Interim nature-based solution not funded.

name: Lamu Channel Tidal Gauge and Early Warning
blocking_factor: Inter-agency MOU between KMD and KMA not signed
notes: Design complete. Two agencies dispute operational ownership. Communities have no advance warning system.

name: Lamu Waterfront Riparian Buffer
blocking_factor: Tourism and fishing community livelihoods on waterfront
notes: Buffer mapped. Enforcement would displace primary economic activity. Successive county governments have declined to enforce.

name: Witu Lowland Drainage and Flood Bunds
blocking_factor: Budget absorption and contractor access to remote area
notes: Design complete 2020. Contractor mobilisation delayed by Lamu security situation. Project stalled since 2021.

name: Lamu Climate Adaptation Plan
blocking_factor: Not adopted — insufficient county technical capacity to implement
notes: Plan drafted with C40 support. County lacks technical staff to implement. No budget line in CIDP 2023-2027.
